final_fusion.name: Final Fusion
final_fusion.description: Represents Aizen's final form after fusing with the Hogyoku. Grants immense power and reality-warping abilities.

skill1.name: Fragor
skill1.effect: Increases ATK by 25% and Accuracy by 10% for 12 seconds. Deals 450% damage in a wide area.
skill1.best_usage: Use as a combo starter to buff subsequent high-damage skills.

skill2.name: Ultra-Fragor
skill2.effect: Creates a containment field that shreds 30% of target's Defense. Deals continuous damage over 4 seconds.
skill2.best_usage: Target high-defense guards or bosses to break their protection.

skill3.name: Hogyoku Transcendence
skill3.explanation: Completely ignores 40% of target's block and adds 10% life steal to all attacks for the duration. If the target is below 20% HP, damage is doubled.
skill3.hidden_interactions: Stacks with soul hall buffs that increase execution threshold.
skill3.combos: Skill 1 -> Skill 2 -> Skill 3 for maximum execution potential.

final_fusion.passive_effects: Grants +5% Damage Reduction for every 10% HP lost.
final_fusion.scaling: Attack scaling is 1.5x higher than average SP cards.

rage.generation: Increases by 15% when attacking targets with higher HP.

analysis.pvp: Dominates the current meta by providing both sustain and burst.
analysis.pve: Excellent for clearing high-level Rift and World Boss due to defense shred.
analysis.guild_war: High utility for point accumulation in large-scale brawls.
analysis.arena: Essential for high-rank players to counter tanky setups.

strategy.weaknesses: Vulnerable to hard CC (Stun/Freeze) during Skill 2 animation.
strategy.strengths: Peerless execution power and high sustainability.
bad_synergies: Characters that knock back enemies away from Skill 2 field.

final_fusion.expert_opinion: This card is a game-changer. If you are running an ATK-focused build, this is your holy grail. The life steal combined with block ignore makes you nearly unstoppable if you manage your cooldowns correctly.
